text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Nishino Flower is reading the fan mail
she's received.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: It's just... this letter really moved me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You see, the person who wrote it has a grandchild
about my age.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's been lonely, living on my own. But watching
your races always cheers me up.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
My grandchild loves watching you just as much as
I do. In fact, you're the first thing we talk about
when we get together these days.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So thank you, Nishino Flower, for being a ray of
sunshine and putting smiles on our faces.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
We'll come to cheer for you at the track next
time.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I have to do my best so that I don't let these two
down! And...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I want to keep making them smile!
